title: Cobblemon: Team Preview
description: A simple Cobblemon mod that shows a preview of your team before battles. Quickly check your party setup and make smarter choices in PvP or friendly matches.
body:
This mod introduces a pre-battle selection screen to Cobblemon. Once a single battle is initiated and both players agree, each trainer must pick the first Pokémon they’ll send out. Instead of being thrown into combat blindly, you get a quick look at your team before the match starts, allowing for smarter openings and a more authentic battle flow.

![Battle Preview Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/964f0a17250793fcd8e4d20d71fe901b52c5dd47_0.webp)
